title: senecio manengubensis
intro: Senecio manengubensis, also known as Manenguba Groundsel, is a species of flowering plant in the sunflower family, native to the tropical forests of Cameroon. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Senecio manengubensis include its potential to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a decoction or infused tea, which can be used to treat various health issues.
